title: Suzzanna: Kliwon Friday Night
story: Suzzanna and her fiancé, Surya, plan to get married soon, but their plans fall apart when Suzzanna has to pay her father's debt, by marrying Raden Aryo, the ruler of the village. On the night of Kliwon Friday, the day Suzzanna gave birth, something terrible happened. Suzzanna's baby was born through her back. Suzzanna's death awakens the terrible Sundel Bolong, who will grip her enemies with fear and take back her child. Can Sundel Bolong protect and get her baby back? And can Suzzanna and Surya be reunited?
